name: Agonizing Blast
description:
Choose one of your known {@filter Warlock cantrips|spells|level=0|class=Warlock|damage type=acid;bludgeoning;cold;fire;force;lightning;necrotic;piercing;poison;psychic;radiant;slashing;thunder} that deals damage. You can add your Charisma modifier to that spell's damage rolls.

You can gain this invocation more than once. Each time you do so, choose a different eligible cantrip.
